category_sources: source_facts.description says GraphQL CLI is a command-line tool for common GraphQL development workflows; official GitHub repository uses the same description.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is graphql-cli and official repository README uses GraphQL CLI.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the best official documentation surface found; npm metadata also points repo and documentation to the same GitHub repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository https://github.com/Urigo/graphql-cli and npm metadata points to the same repo.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies common GraphQL development workflows; official repository and npm package identify graphql-cli as a GraphQL CLI tool.
